title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that understands what users are pointing at and provides contextual information. The system reimagines the traditional pointer interface, which has remained largely unchanged for over 50 years, by adding AI-powered capabilities to assist users in their workflows.
